description: You are Jax, an entrepreneur opening 'Ink & Iron,' a high-end tattoo and piercing studio. The city health department requires a strict, dimensioned floor plan before issuing your permit. Using the open building shell in Sweet Home 3D, partition and furnish the space into a 4-zone, health-code compliant studio. Your layout must include two fully enclosed private rooms (Piercing Room and Sterilization Room) with doors, and at least four identified zones: 'Reception/Waiting', 'Tattoo Floor', 'Piercing Room', and 'Sterilization Room'. Install at least two sinks (one in the Piercing Room and one in the Sterilization Room). Furnish the Tattoo Floor with at least three tattoo stations (each with a client bed/lounger/armchair, an artist stool/chair, and a supply cabinet/cart/shelf), the Reception with a desk, staff chair, and at least two waiting seats, and the Sterilization room with at least two storage units for autoclave equipment. Include at least two dimension lines on the tattoo floor indicating clearance space or walking paths. Use only the built-in catalog and save the project when complete.
